title: Using constant value from an interface

features.name: interface parameter calculated from other parameters
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameter that is calculated from other parameters using expressions
features.snippet: interface subm #( parameter X=0, parameter Y=0 ); parameter A = X+Y; endinterface

features.name: signal sized by interface parameter
features.description: Code should include a reg signal declared inside an interface with width determined by a parameter
features.snippet: interface subm #( parameter A=0 ); reg [A:1] C; endinterface

features.name: hierarchical access to interface parameter in localparam
features.description: Code should include a localparam assignment using hierarchical reference to an interface parameter

features.name: bits_function on interface signal
features.description: Code should include $bits() function applied to a signal inside an interface, used in localparam context
